zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Tichborne於1531年1月1日出生在英國哈普爾奧迪哈姆時，她的父親Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire24歲，母親Juliana Fenrother29歲。她於1544年與Thomas Cresvile結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Odiam, Hampshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾奧迪哈姆
zh-hans.Bodenham, Hereford, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾波登哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Tichborne于1531年1月1日出生在英国哈普爾奧迪哈姆时，她的父亲Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire24岁，母亲Juliana Fenrother29岁。她于1544年与Thomas Cresvile结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tichborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tichband
meanings: English: variant of Tichborne with excrescent -d. Compare Chadband , Goodband , Osband , and Rathband .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Tichborne was born on 1 January 1531, in Odiham, Hampshire, England, her father, Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire, was 24 and her mother, Juliana Fenrother, was 29. She married Thomas Cresvile in 1544. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Tichborne est née le 1 janvier 1531, à Odiham, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Juliana Fenrother, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cresvile en 1544. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Tichborne am 1. Januar 1531 in Odiham, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire 24 und ihre Mutter Juliana Fenrother 29. Sie hat 1544 Thomas Cresvile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Tichborne è nata il il 1 gennaio 1531 nel Odiham, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Juliana Fenrother, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cresvile nel 1544. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Tichborneが1531年1月1日にイギリスハンプシュアイアオディハムで生まれた時，父Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshireは24歳，母Juliana Fenrotherは29歳であった。1544年にThomas Cresvileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Tichborne(이)가 1531년 1월 1일 영국 함프실르 오디함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana Fenrother(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1544년 Thomas Cresvile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Tichborne nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1531, em Odiham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Fenrother, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cresvile em 1544. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Tichborne родилась 1 января 1531 г. в местности одихам, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Fenrother, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cresvile в 1544 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana Tichborne nació el 1 de enero de 1531, en Odiham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Juliana Fenrother, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Cresvile en 1544. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
